role: A React region component that renders the self-modification audit log filtered to an indicated ui:// element's code scope and wires per-row revert through the existing AppContext revert gate.
capabilities: Conditionally render only when a ui:// element is indicated
Display a three-way status: corpus-stale, no-code-scope, or true-empty
List filtered self-change rows with subject, matched-file count, and relative timestamp
Offer per-row operator-only revert for self-apply commits via revertSelfChangeAt(sha)
Reuse shared design-system event-row vocabulary plus SectionHead and Badge components
substance_why: It implements full conditional rendering, a three-way fail-loud status trichotomy, a mapped change list with tooltips, and a wired revert interaction using context-provided data and helpers.
interactions_present: Reacts to the indicated ui:// address from AppContext to show or hide the region
Clicking a row's '↩ revert' button calls revertSelfChangeAt(c.sha) through the existing /api/revert gate
Hovering the matched-files count shows a tooltip listing files touched at this scope
interactions_missing: No confirmation or undo flow before triggering revert
No feedback or progress state for an in-flight revert action
No error handling or retry affordance if selfChanges fetch or revert fails
No navigation to commit detail, diff view, or full audit log
No keyboard accessibility or focus management for row actions
No handling for indication changes mid-fetch or stale-to-loaded transitions
performance_risks: Unbounded change list rendered without virtualization, risking large DOM for busy scopes
New inline arrow function created per row on every render for the revert onClick
No memoization of rows or derived state, causing re-renders on any context update
Tooltip strings built by joining matched_files arrays inline per render
reuse_why: Preserve the fail-loud trichotomy, the ui:// indication gating, and the existing revert integration, but rebuild the monolithic component into smaller presentational pieces and add proper loading, error, and confirmation states.
decomposition_hints: Split data/state access into a dedicated useSelfChanges hook so the view is pure
Extract SelfChangesStatus component for stale / no-scope / empty cues
Extract SelfChangesRow component with its own revert button state and confirmation
Share the revert affordance with the existing Grow/History revert button component
